name: Never Gone
overview: The romance between failing student Su Yunjin and high school genius Cheng Zheng is broken apart due to clashing personalities and a huge difference in social status. Coincidentally, they meet again in the workforce and get entangled in each other’s lives again.

trailers.title: 《原来你还在这里》杨子姗韩东君为爱痴缠开启虐恋 优酷11月6日开播
